metadata.title: Timing the Perfect Double Kill with Sharp Angles in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Check out this slick double kill where positioning and timing come together seamlessly. Notice how smooth peeks and steady aim close the round fast.
What’s your favorite angle to hold? Share your clutch moments below!

Drop your best clutch plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #clutch #fps
